fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases retain exact face counts. The authored and peak-height cases also have exact vertex counts (11,971 / 11,199) after restoring the guide curve's Blender float32 control points and preserving the already-normalized Curve to Points tangent. The edited NODE DOJO case is topology-exact before Merge by Distance at 18,068 / 12,432 with identical four-decimal bounds. Selecting the active Factor_Vector on Blender's Non-Uniform Vector Mix reduces the post-surface placement RMS error from 0.0473912 to 0.00000304 units (maximum 0.0000992) while preserving every face. Pure String to Curves geometry keeps Blender's implicit curve-radius bounds for the marching grid, while mixed mesh/font diagnostics use positional font bounds. The wider welded sweep remains near-exact: edited text is +6 vertices, line thickness is +2, and subdivide 12 is -5, with exact faces; maximum rounded bounds error is 0.1327 units. Those remaining count residuals are localized to the lower marching branch's proximity interpolation and eleven-or-fewer pairs straddling the final 1e-5 weld, not the weld algorithm or upper-surface placement.
